last_review_summary: Review completed with significant gaps identified: No token refill over time tests (core algorithm untested), No RedisStorage tests (only InMemoryStorage tested), No 429 response tests (denial path untested), No error handling tests (Redis failure paths untested), Wrong assertion (test expects False but impl returns True for zero bucket_size), Missing per-tenant override tests, Missing tier limits tests, Brittle mocking in middleware tests
